name: Booker HQ
subject: A huge loss for our party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Because Cory won't be on stage tonight, it's likely that important issues won't get much air time -- and we should all be upset by that. Friend, In about an hour, seven candidates for president will be taking the stage for the December DNC debate. Unfortunately, for the first time in this election, Cory won't be one of them. Of course, we're bummed out that he won't be able to share his vision for America on a national stage. And frankly, the entire Democratic Party should be upset about it too. **Not having Cory 's voice up there is a huge loss for all of us who care not only about beating Donald Trump, but about bringing our country together to solve some of our biggest problems.** So far in these debates, we've barely touched on the existential threat of the climate crisis; we've hardly had the opportunity to discuss the fact that reproductive rights are being stripped away from people, state by state; there's been almost no conversation on the growing number of trans women of color being killed in our country; and, without Cory on stage, I doubt anyone will talk through their plan to close the racial wealth gap. Because Cory won't be on stage tonight, it's likely that these important issues won't get much air time -- and we should all be upset by that. **That 's why we're fighting hard to make sure he's part of the next one. We know that Cory's voice is essential to this race.** **[If you agree, chip in and help us hit our $800,000 end-of-year fundraising goal to get Cory's message out to more folks in early states.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_BHQ_20191219-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Jenna Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_BHQ_20191219-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd1/5fca0d19/78699571/291cebb3/628294016/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd1/5fca0d19/78699571/291cebb2/628294016/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd1/5fca0d19/78699571/291cebb1/628294016/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd1/5fca0d19/78699571/291cebb0/628294016/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd1/5fca0d19/78699571/291cebb4/628294016/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Evi Steyer
subject: [12 Days of Tom] Family of 6
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hi, friend! Tonight, before my dad gets up on that debate stage in Los Angeles, I wanted to say **thank you** on behalf of the **six** members of our family! Your support has meant so much to my dad over the past few months, and to all of us. As the original members of #TeamTom, we’re thrilled to invite so many new members to the team as America sees how dedicated my dad is to making the world a better place. Tonight, my dad will be on the Democratic debate stage talking about the issues that he cares about — the issues _we_ care about. **Will you join me in watching my dad in the Democratic primary debate tonight? Make sure to tune in at 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time/8:00 p.m. Eastern Time to PBS or [_bookmark this link to watch online tonight._](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBoYLxCdkRThwlpwaRHTXJE2-2FvF-2FIL0CHu7vBYJiOCZa7b0p8ALIidDtpmFj-2BYgHpfcAuwfJmw33vcOsW89HtwQ8F3F1Bt8wySo7jLM7-2FbpYTKL4WFrQpmrW05PRb3YWFVg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFeXqjaRwxYFgAkuI3oXH4S4ByuHtg1Vn6gUV9NsqeGM-2B7tNIAdh1eoxa0RUZvR0aLxSZjUsH0Wuuqq34n3lNJWqqk8-2Ba-2Bcfhj3-2BfpLWjkmghglHh8tU3HTfKzBafrFdSD8e-2FqpfzgROYL1nw2qEW70A4MTQW0oYtU-2BQL2NBqqMiwwsd54uDTBsb3eYdCmyzp75lbFmXa32eIxB3hz8EgdXcTLFaEZTvMnNQX4Fjs1XkCM9sam0wkAjzeTvE2CoX2EBJHv7PgclCKHGFRpkzjuvekcyvcq2EKT7qfu-2BURAVr18uDqk1cJ6JdegigQuh5UtDGXSKoUW9VALexB-2B1SiO8RnUQQv0c7NFoEfl7qV-2B2FWQ-3D-3D)** You can join the fun by following the TeamTom account at _**[@TomHQ](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBlsvboSNDJPXF4qZRpCqXpCH9Xzt4Q8KOQapOo9RMWX3_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFeXqjaRwxYFgAkuI3oXH4S4ByuHtg1Vn6gUV9NsqeGM-2B7tNIAdh1eoxa0RUZvR0aLxSZjUsH0Wuuqq34n3lNJWqqk8-2Ba-2Bcfhj3-2BfpLWjkmghglHh8tU3HTfKzBafrFdSD-2B-2BJH0JZ4N5LwF74oLxv-2Bd0U3EPvBEEhnTr5AeNTYovLUPAIt1n4inFSjb-2FIjDfhevjdka6-2ByNwph4KEIwv6J-2FhmsdsLYJJyMatZFj3apEYHgZmw5JT-2BhIug-2BR4uDfWo-2Fp5-2BbbGVkRn-2BWtIw6DxFHBWq2YKAnV6Anx2GXj8Un4-2BRjNJSMhDBexLUw4QbYC7TKRdYMrbG4hy2wniEs-2FUzgni3neARDPrfzL35EfrDKKHrA-3D-3D)**_ and using #TeamTom on any social media you post. clean_body: | | | | Hi, friend! Tonight, before my dad gets up on that debate stage in Los Angeles, I wanted to say thank you on behalf of the six members of our family! Your support has meant so much to my dad over the past few months, and to all of us. As the original members of #TeamTom, we’re thrilled to invite so many new members to the team as America sees how dedicated my dad is to making the world a better place. Tonight, my dad will be on the Democratic debate stage talking about the issues that he cares about — the issues we care about. Will you join me in watching my dad in the Democratic primary debate tonight? Make sure to tune in at 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time/8:00 p.m. Eastern Time to PBS or You can join the fun by following the TeamTom account at and using #TeamTom on any social media you post. Warmly, Evi Steyer P.S. Are you or do you know an eligible American voter living abroad? I live and work in London, and we need Americans abroad to sign the petition for my dad to appear on the Democrats Abroad Primary Ballot. This is part of our 12 Days of Tom email series -- a way to look at the past, present, and future of this campaign! It's also to celebrate the holidays and have a little fun in the process. | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! name: Nate Clem
subject: an introduction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm Nate, Admiral Franken's new Finance Director, and I wanted to take a moment to say "Hi."
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello Team Franken, I'm Nate, Admiral Franken's new Finance Director, and I wanted to take a moment to say "Hi." Joining this campaign is a privilege for me, since I get to dedicate my time to electing a true leader for Iowa. The admiral is ready to go to Washington and fight for our farmers, our economy, and to take on the climate crisis. **But he can 't do it without your help.** **[Can you chip in $5, $10, or $15 today?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b9403/2638619665/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_L1&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941c/2638619665/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_btn1&amount=15")
---
This election is a crucial tossup, and we have a chance to flip this seat from red to blue -- making a Democratic majority more likely.
And that majority means we'll have the ability to lower the cost of health care, improve the quality of jobs in Iowa, **and hold our elected leaders accountable** \-- _a failure of Joni Ernst and the current Senate._
Look, I just drove to Iowa a couple of weeks ago, but I have to hit the ground running, because one of the most important deadlines are coming up quickly: our end-of-year fundraising goal.
[**Can you help us with a quick donation? Any amount helps.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941d/2638619665/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_L2&amount=15")
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
[**$10**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941e/2638619665/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true") | **[$25](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941f/2638619665/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b9418/2638619665/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b9419/2638619665/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941a/2638619665/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243a/33365068/4a6298f1/3f8b941b/2638619665/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191219_em_fr_all_nateintro_abx6&amount=15")**
Thank you,
Nate Clem
Finance Director
Franken for Iowa

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi doesn’t want to talk about impeachment
body:
For nearly 3 years, Democrats in Congress openly made plans to impeach President Donald J. Trump. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bb260e7b8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 19, 2019
---
| | |
# **Nancy Pelosi doesn’t want to talk about impeachment**

**So much for “solemn.”**

**For nearly 3 years,** Democrats in Congress openly made plans to impeach President Donald J. Trump. While Speaker Nancy Pelosi claimed that “no one comes to Congress to impeach a president,” some House Democrats did exactly that—and said so explicitly.

**“I would vote yes”** on impeachment, [one said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13b2ffb631&e=3ee4985eea) during her campaign more than a year ago. “I recognize [President Trump] as a tyrant.”

**Another Democrat** [made this promise](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f43abebdab&e=3ee4985eea) hours after she was sworn into office in January: “We’re gonna impeach the motherf****r.”

**The list goes on.** Speaker Pelosi doesn’t want mainstream Americans to see comments like those. She knows the rest of the country would be appalled by the way House Democrats talk to their far-left base. And she knows it would expose the truth about impeachment: that it was always a partisan move to silence the voices of 63 million Americans. It never mattered what the facts were or what the law said.

**You can’t have it both ways.** Democrats can’t lecture the country about the gravity of impeachment and then turn right around and make a mockery of it for their voters.

**Yesterday** , **Speaker Pelosi** assured the public that the impeachment vote would be a “solemn” process and a prayerful day for America. Not everyone got the memo:
* Pelosi had to not-so-subtly [remind House Democrats not to cheer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=000197199f&e=3ee4985eea) during the final vote yesterday. Remember: _solemn_.

* Far-left Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI) [gleefully recorded a selfie video](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=740c1b9e10&e=3ee4985eea) gearing up for the vote.

* “Nonpartisan” _Washington Post_ reporters [posted a celebratory group photo](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56596b312b&e=3ee4985eea) and wished everyone a “Merry Impeachmas.”

**Speaker Pelosi** may be captive to her party’s growing radical, Democrat-Socialist movement, but she’s no dummy. She knows how bad this all looks. In full damage-control mode, she made two shocking announcements just hours after the House vote.

**The first is that** she’s done talking about impeachment. “I’m not going to answer any more questions” about it, she said this morning.

**Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham** [called her out](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd1d3ff193&e=3ee4985eea), noting that the White House had been answering reporters’ questions about it all morning. “When you wrongfully impeach a President, people deserve answers. You’ve been talking nothing but impeachment for months (years really)—why the silence now?”

**The second stunning move** Speaker Pelosi announced? After rushing to complete the fastest impeachment of a President in U.S. history, the House will now hold onto the Articles of Impeachment instead of passing them along to the Senate for trial. Democrat leaders know the Senate will acquit President Trump—after all, their Articles don’t even allege that he committed a crime—and they don’t want the weakness of their case exposed.

**House Democrats** got their historic day. They now own the first impeachment in American history that had no bipartisan support, only bipartisan opposition. They now own the first impeachment that contains no criminal violations, only political disputes.

**It’s a terrible precedent** for our country. Speaker Pelosi knows that. Just don’t ask her about it, OK?

[Here’s what President Trump did today.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=481087eaa9&e=3ee4985eea)

**Something to share** : [They’re not after me. They’re after you.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12e230db9a&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Team Tina
subject: An important test for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Any sign of weakness in our FEC report could be an opportunity for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell to pounce.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191219-eoq1?refcode=em191219-eoq1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend, our most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year is less than two weeks away.

At that point, we'll tally up how much we raised this quarter and send it to the Federal Election Commission -- where they'll make our numbers public. Every candidate running for office must file their numbers to be transparent and honest about who's contributing to their campaign.

It also means everyone from Donald Trump to Mitch McConnell will pore over our numbers to figure out how strong (or vulnerable) we are. Any sign of weakness in our FEC report could be an opportunity for them to pounce.

**This is an important test for our team, folks. We need as many names on our FEC report as possible to show just how many people are behind Tina in this race. subject: A reporter asked me what I thought about impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Yesterday, Democrats voted to impeach the President. Today, a reporter stopped me and asked me what I thought of the impeachment process. **[Rush a donation to help me fight back against House Democrats —> ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=f4cb8330c1864f40bc188f21cd87ca2b&_e=F3aN74EXgnG_NAWns1pAjad72leu6XuM0CONV6YuXoeGxutYowQoJ68IZVUPzv5Oe402KF29yb6amHU9Fa5j_F7tJiDDqntDpU40H9nGQ_sIBd4WyjVX7X1e5m9v0fm5myzPcGw1s51Zdq91F9qWvUnbVCMxRA3H2mT_KLjnQZsLJ2yfA17SZCOGg4TdOS1qqVlvlsmkUc6XH2fpqxYGOOYfbxl2JKqyN_Hse8T3xpUOj5lzIg5G9Gq3NIZeYFBYhVrpVcgkahmAWRveKB2bCCjUTAUYM2T-iGK9iOB2kaatCIPDva9mlboI8VzfQo6649nj6_s2exV-NxY_ZwOJWZ2lVtojgr7wIYl6pxR5JGp1c9nwIv65u41JseAqDOka_j0hSFJjhFUHy90sKBjVYA%3D%3D)** [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=f4cb8330c1864f40bc188f21cd87ca2b&_e=F3aN74EXgnG_NAWns1pAjad72leu6XuM0CONV6YuXoeGxutYowQoJ68IZVUPzv5Oe402KF29yb6amHU9Fa5j_F7tJiDDqntDpU40H9nGQ_sIBd4WyjVX7X1e5m9v0fm5myzPcGw1s51Zdq91F9qWvUnbVCMxRA3H2mT_KLjnQZsLJ2yfA17SZCOGg4TdOS1qMR1Jjv2elyMBZfoj4T11PiZWnjMN0lgIE6VJX81mzy0r0u9C5u9pgrChco5mveRvyFYpueFbu4BNn0EOaGFlZmig4CRrMpbWJpxJcj3KE5BOPZJy_kel4gQqjuQ5XUZRT36dnKR4jruyOqcBURvY5z6smGfW1wE2bH60vhIUclvmMcQz7l4Fe6xoXVEnEyNuLqtgPJaAy2BSGiiw4zjTHg%3D%3D) Friend, Yesterday, Democrats voted to impeach the President. Today, a reporter stopped me and asked me what I thought of the impeachment process.
My answer?
**“Bullshit to the fourth degree.” **
**[Rush a donation to help me fight back against House Democrats — >](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=f4cb8330c1864f40bc188f21cd87ca2b&_e=F3aN74EXgnG_NAWns1pAjad72leu6XuM0CONV6YuXoeGxutYowQoJ68IZVUPzv5Oe402KF29yb6amHU9Fa5j_F7tJiDDqntDpU40H9nGQ_sIBd4WyjVX7X1e5m9v0fm5myzPcGw1s51Zdq91F9qWvUnbVCMxRA3H2mT_KLjnQZsLJ2yfA17SZCOGg4TdOS1qUByUaXoOHX0dt5jR6B2lTbjCUPYafFRK2fwhS9kradzcWjO0UugRIUPb0Iy6pXjlvL3mffl85PxIhb1XodmeSDhwUtteMD2oLH-x7cQ9OU0KlQVM7oVowgSF9FTouL436wDtB5-tp7Xb2t6eZdnp79bHn7t0CLSTcM3gviJOCK19J96mKIp-lg2a_N8E7ZIJtcuvxMAM9y-zHjnd9UjLEA%3D%3D)**
I don’t normally use that kind of language, but there’s no other word that accurately describes the House Democrats’ attempts to overturn the results of the 2016 election. **The whole process has been a politically motivated sham since Day 1. **
**That’s why I’ve fought back against this bullshit, every step of the way. **
**[Will you rush a donation to help us fight back against House Democrats?](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=f4cb8330c1864f40bc188f21cd87ca2b&_e=F3aN74EXgnG_NAWns1pAjad72leu6XuM0CONV6YuXoeGxutYowQoJ68IZVUPzv5Oe402KF29yb6amHU9Fa5j_F7tJiDDqntDpU40H9nGQ_sIBd4WyjVX7X1e5m9v0fm5myzPcGw1s51Zdq91F9qWvUnbVCMxRA3H2mT_KLjnQZsLJ2yfA17SZCOGg4TdOS1q2KkbunwR1aLb7Iks3_UAvCxIwDQVUa00IrOOlPNZoC94UWkL-0T-EomRU4WUp0sHs15RLeqFXwJlt04bv7D-XUeMa5yqCgxssoUeDj7B1sNjXHO9BvkPcsFhllR9J4gefyE2ikJO22hvSyZ2e1v-RFecqh3vN8QJRB3I8pclZBZSQKx8eewqRpWdrwdvb6cy1uzZYNW9TZgbjE2kofxpcw%3D%3D)**

An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. clean_body: Yesterday, Democrats voted to impeach the President. Today, a reporter stopped me and asked me what I thought of the impeachment process. Friend, Yesterday, Democrats voted to impeach the President. Today, a reporter stopped me and asked me what I thought of the impeachment process. My answer? “Bullshit to the fourth degree.” I don’t normally use that kind of language, but there’s no other word that accurately describes the House Democrats’ attempts to overturn the results of the 2016 election. The whole process has been a politically motivated sham since Day 1. That’s why I’ve fought back against this bullshit, every step of the way. -Greg | | | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: the debate is done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, At tonight's debate we heard arguments about wine caves and billionaire donors. **Once again, so many important issues were ignored. **Nothing about criminal justice, police violence, or the housing crisis. We saw a historically diverse field that discussed issues far and wide, shrink to a small group of candidates discussing issues we hear about everyday. [Donate >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94d/3eb3e2fc/69d413fc/744ef853/3273146175/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all") **With 76% of Democratic voters still undecided, we know that folks are looking for more than a few sound bites in a debate.** They are looking for details. They want to know who we are, what we stand for, and to know the specifics about what we plan to do for the country. I've put out detailed plans on topics including: housing, education, immigration, lead poisoning, policing reform, disabilities, Indigenous communities, foster care, as well as an economic plan for working families. [We're seeing an outpouring of support from across the country from folks who want to make sure these issues remain front-and-center, and make sure this campaign charges into the new year at full speed. Help us reach our debate fundraising goal, contribute now. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94d/3eb3e2fc/69d413fc/744ef852/3273146175/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+seeing+an+outpouring+of+suppor&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
Thanks,
Julian
---

---

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94d/3eb3e2fc/69d413fc/744ef85e/3273146175/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94d/3eb3e2fc/69d413fc/744ef85d/3273146175/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94d/3eb3e2fc/69d413fc/744ef85c/3273146175/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm determined to be back on the debate stage in January.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I wasn't on the debate stage tonight, friend. Instead, I spent my evening talking to caucus-goers and supporters in Iowa. I had some great conversations with Iowans and even hopped on the phone alongside some of our organizers and volunteers during a phonebank. We talked about my plans to fight for reproductive rights, advance environmental justice, end the epidemic of gun violence, reform our broken criminal justice system -- and many more issues that I would've spoken to had I had the chance to bring them up during tonight's debate. I may not have been on the stage, but we did go up on the air tonight with our first television ad of this campaign -- reaching millions of viewers. For an underdog campaign like ours, that's huge. The only reason we were able to do this was because tens of thousands of supporters stepped up in the past few weeks to help make it happen. **As we work towards qualifying for the January debate, we 're going to need the resources to keep spreading our message of justice for all nationwide. Will you chip in right now?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_CB_20191219-fr-CB-EM5-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

It's certainly true that I'm not a self-funding billionaire. That made it a little harder to secure my spot on a stage that ended up having more billionaires than Black people. **It was a shame that the rich diversity of our party wasn 't represented during tonight's debate.**
But I'm determined to be back on that stage in January. **[With your support, we will make it happen.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_CB_20191219-fr-CB-EM5-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd3/5fca0d19/7b97d3ba/291cea58/3119572582/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd3/5fca0d19/7b97d3ba/291ceaa7/3119572582/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd3/5fca0d19/7b97d3ba/291ceaa6/3119572582/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cd3/5fca0d19/7b97d3ba/291ceaa5/3119572582/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

**I'm deeply grateful for everything you do as a member of this grassroots team.**

The movement we've built together has come so far. Now, we're in the final push to the first caucuses and primaries.

Side by side, we're building a movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history -- by campaigning on the biggest anti-corruption platform since Watergate. And shoulder to shoulder, we're fighting for an economy that works for all of us.

**Our next big test is the final FEC fundraising deadline of 2019.**

**[It is powerfully important that we reach our end-of-year goals, so I'm asking you: Can you make your first contribution right now?

name: Tom Steyer
subject: important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
I respect all the candidates who were on the debate stage with me tonight. But after every conversation we have together, I keep coming back to one thought: we’re running out of time. By now, we’re aware of the brutal truth about climate change, but it bears repeating. **Our house is on fire, our rivers and coasts are flooding, and we have a very narrow window to make drastic changes before the devastation is irreversible.** Although I know that any person on tonight’s stage would be a major improvement upon the criminal in the White House, the other candidates want to continue using a broken system that has failed to pass meaningful climate action for 20 years. I’m the only one who’s willing to declare the climate crisis a national emergency on day one and make it the top priority of my administration. Because if it isn’t number one, it just won’t get done. [_**Join me if you agree that we’re running out of time — donate today to support this work.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC3ma3sCTqoaWLB5kuMvLA6tmAEsS-2BSJWpQ5qNhbevrPgJ0-2BsfaQQaTS0xa-2FvXhqqvGVMXKoXWMf3MMGOVvLOlYBHcQeYg-2BP6OT7GdTueb3FzZOjwHetQaWcmTIGxVpvAHQD2wlaIW5MP7SviWMsQZYfd9oEuZIMt2Vd9uk-2BWV2YOlRdQxtkOHaD7LzalySAugo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEfMDVgenuIpuaqOZjDID1RvhNGhYRMastDcDetuZ96NJr-2BwzVd7v-2B-2F-2By-2BBt4mreLTnIfeSZRUWC6QAviIqN9uOhBce1at-2BdUwIYSwn3Kk-2Buhr481cLUX73tHr1fALe1-2Btzu2fLyY85nrP47gJct7Z4Mw6BMhtSkHmOMRmYy9BoK-2BF06P-2BNDO7i9cqCngDKJMVIQFc3fQHXCASrpq4n0wdUlxdThJZn9EOfa-2FAT3S6ztrSAN1kLYhLBC8luB1EA-2FsxKTWfF-2BRtADc870lt70EvcWnPpkn-2BAwA-2F5pMiePwCXRt3Oo6hMT-2BXbiZUFiNXXCcdBbhAvZ-2FnVqAVCQkoQVhHu4yvvmS6jQAPnRwQuHJlTZbkrU4sXB1dP0avfOV3qsyjMZ6HVVMbSn5SKHhK5H0x0m437HZwktbbyRTgA6YK0IcKyip5sG0MsqtNaQVK7FR7MSceLXCkOI-2FkoloZQcXJaA-2F9gFVo1IKgdglU-2BEkise0Hdlu1Za8EHjGty26qlCFDqTgsK5WXj7tRmRzI7b76r) Time to fight for climate,

clean_body: | | | | I respect all the candidates who were on the debate stage with me tonight. But after every conversation we have together, I keep coming back to one thought: we’re running out of time. By now, we’re aware of the brutal truth about climate change, but it bears repeating. Our house is on fire, our rivers and coasts are flooding, and we have a very narrow window to make drastic changes before the devastation is irreversible. Although I know that any person on tonight’s stage would be a major improvement upon the criminal in the White House, the other candidates want to continue using a broken system that has failed to pass meaningful climate action for 20 years. I’m the only one who’s willing to declare the climate crisis a national emergency on day one and make it the top priority of my administration. Because if it isn’t number one, it just won’t get done. Time to fight for climate, Tom If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! These televised debates are nothing more than a media circus -- they haven't helped voters make up their minds.

Michael is on his way to his next town hall in New Hampshire in the morning, meeting real voters where they are because it's them - not arbitrary thresholds - that will decide this race.

After a decade in the Senate, Michael is widely considered one of the most respected and thoughtful Democrats in Washington. He's the type of leader that can unite our divided country.

[We set a goal to raise $700,000 to launch a crucial paid media and organizing program to get Michael's message in front of the 76% of undecided Democratic voters.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8d0/134673f2/941cb8e/69978797/369839553/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: About tonight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is one of the biggest moments of the campaign. Yang Gang, can you rush a donation before midnight?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4953%2E377263%2EbVtKe0) Yang Gang --

I just stepped off the debate stage and couldn’t be more fired up.

More folks are tuning in to our Humanity First vision than ever before and that’s because of the movement you built, Yang Gang.

Everything you’re doing is paying off. And I could not be more proud to be your candidate.

**But here’s the truth: The media, establishment, and everyone watching will use what we fundraise in the next 24 hours to measure the strength of our campaign. So we need you to give it all you can TONIGHT. **

[This is one of the biggest moments of the campaign. Yang Gang, can you donate $10 or more before midnight? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20150?t=5&akid=4953%2E377263%2EbVtKe0) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20150?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4953%2E377263%2EbVtKe0)

---
What we’ve done together is incredible -- but we can’t lose sight of our goal to get to the White House. It is crucial that we leverage this moment to reach the next level.

Let’s keep pushing. Let’s show our fellow Americans who should go up against Trump in 2020. Let’s let everyone know we’re here to win.

[Donate $10 or more before midnight and let’s take this fight all the way to the White House. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20150?t=12&akid=4953%2E377263%2EbVtKe0)

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20150?t=13&akid=4953%2E377263%2EbVtKe0)

| | | Peter, I call it like I see it - and let me tell you, right now I am VERY concerned.

The Democrats are clearly desperate to prop up liberal Doug Jones. Coastal elites and special interests are pouring MILLIONS into Alabama, as they seek to hold every seat they can and seize control of the U.S. Senate.

Just imagine what would happen to President Trump right now with this whole impeachment debacle if the Democrats had the Senate majority!

**Doug Jones has raised more than $5.6 million this year, and counting**. That is a massive sum. The Democrats have their act together... that's why EVERY contribution right now is vital to our success.

You may have seen the latest polling. We're neck-and-neck with Jeff Sessions. We must stand united now to win the primary on March 3rd, and emerge ready to take on and DEFEAT Doug Jones and the Democrat campaign machine!

_**[Please rush an urgently-needed $5, $10, $25, or $50 secure contribution today, or more if you can](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=15b2884b9cd7cf8fd0f8f9d35b815f934b7e23af15062d96ed9d5c0367769ee8dc16e8631c2d5474ce3c1a416d7a5831300dfe5f647abc3b "Please rush an urgently-needed $5, $10, $25, or $50 secure contribution today, or more if you can")**_[.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=15b2884b9cd7cf8ff062476cc290a1a7c78b196ccf4a351a205522f45a1e0c90320e46a2ac1eb6e6973bdd498d73907cea39d08b75f48b17 "Please rush an urgently-needed $5, $10, $25, or $50 secure contribution today, or more if you can.")

After the December 31 FEC deadline, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become available to the public.

Reporters, pundits, and Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of our campaign.

**This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible.

We've crunched the numbers, and we need 207 supporters from Pennsylvania to step up today to stay on track to reach our goal of 1,000,000 unique grassroots donors.**

We know this is a big goal, but our movement has helped crush all our goals until this point. We believe that with your help, we can reach this goal, too.

**[We wouldn't be asking if this weren't important. Will still need 207 more donors from Pennsylvania to chip in today to get us back on track. body:

name: Greg Stanton
subject: What it will take to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Last night's debate made it seem like there are only two "electability" arguments for Democratic candidates.

**The debate made it seem like to win, candidates need to appeal to voters on either coast, the south, or the midwest... **

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/AlH-ypuceXzDj9PvVcZdHEkQSsmq5qYbzGbagJq6g-U=?refcode=X_122019_TOTVFund_I&amount=50&recurring=auto)

When in reality, if we are talking about "electability", the only question that candidates should be being asked is how will they drive record turnout in Arizona, which is the tipping point state.

[**Will you help me prioritize Democratic voter turnout in Maricopa County in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/AlH-ypuceXzDj9PvVcZdHEkQSsmq5qYbzGbagJq6g-U=?refcode=X_122019_TOTVFund_I&amount=50&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/AlH-ypuceXzDj9PvVcZdHEkQSsmq5qYbzGbagJq6g-U=?refcode=X_122019_TOTVFund_I&amount=50&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/ZjfZfLOMy1nrwvaRisqs2z_UN7b1-UQx4jgVbdriNJI=)

As someone who has been elected Mayor of Phoenix and to Congress in Arizona's "purple" Ninth District, I know a thing or two about how to drive voter turnout here in Maricopa County.

**It takes a concerted effort to get our message out to young people, Latinos, and working families here in Phoenix and the surrounding suburbs.**

[**My voter turnout initiative will do just that to help Democrats up-and-down the ballot win here in Arizona -- Will you chip in to help?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/AlH-ypuceXzDj9PvVcZdHEkQSsmq5qYbzGbagJq6g-U=?refcode=X_122019_TOTVFund_I&amount=50&recurring=auto)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/AlH-ypuceXzDj9PvVcZdHEkQSsmq5qYbzGbagJq6g-U=?refcode=X_122019_TOTVFund_I&amount=50&recurring=auto)

Thanks for helping our campaign drive voter turnout in Arizona,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/MlHBJHUVop9caDn-8YC0l1s77uvUpUizmPETPD6FVsM=/RzBNWc2QUbZwa22ovk5ql6mQQJUsk8po7PeB9KOKE2A=)._

The debate made it seem like to win, candidates need to appeal to voters on either coast, the south, or the midwest... When in reality, if we are talking about "electability", the only question that candidates should be being asked is how will they drive record turnout in Arizona, which is the tipping point state. = As someone who has been elected Mayor of Phoenix and to Congress in Arizona's "purple" Ninth District, I know a thing or two about how to drive voter turnout here in Maricopa County. It takes a concerted effort to get our message out to young people, Latinos, and working families here in Phoenix and the surrounding suburbs. Thanks for helping our campaign drive voter turnout in Arizona, \-- Greg Stanton Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

name: Gary (personal)
subject: down to the wire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
the bad news is we fell short of our match goal last night

---
| |
---
Friend, the bad news is we fell short of our match goal last night. And now, three GOP outside groups are already spending more against me than all other in-cycle Democratic senators combined.

**This means our chances of protecting Michigan's Democratic Senate seat are in real danger.**

But here's the good news: That same group of generous donors just agreed to EXTEND their match opportunity after Trump's visit to Michigan. **They will DOUBLE all gifts to help us raise the additional $6,100 we still need to win, but ONLY until 5 p.m. **

Friend - falling short a second time is simply not an option. The future of the Senate and the Supreme Court are on the line here in Michigan, and this race will come down to the wire. I'm counting on you to give now and have your gift doubled.

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da914/5721a3ed/7190aa8f/efb45b5/2483045535/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNjYtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: Team Scholten
subject: Photos: Where we’ve been
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

It’s been a little while since we’ve sent you some updates from the road! J.D. has been moving along on his first 39-county tour of Iowa’s 4th district -- in fact, he’s already visited 33 towns of less than 1,000 people to listen and learn about the challenges and opportunities of our small towns.

**We can’t wait to get back on the road to keep this going in 2020 -- but we need your help to make sure we can finish our first 39-county tour and meet with, listen to, and learn from every voter possible.**

**[Can you contribute $5 or more to make sure we can visit all 39 counties in Iowa’s 4th district?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069602/135205142/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)**
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069603/135205143/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
Now, a look at where we’ve been:

We heard that North Union High School in Armstrong (pop. 863) lost several of its teachers to Fairmont, MN, a town just across the border that pays its teachers $8,000 more. Our district needs a representative who will fight for better wages and investments in education.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069604/135205144/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
In Ute (pop. 345), Michelle told us about her son’s struggles as a farmer. Their farm is his home and his life, but “get big or get off the farm policies” are limiting their markets, taking away their choices, and reducing their independence. We need to do everything we can to empower everyday farmers and enforce our antitrust laws.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069605/135205145/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
It was great to have Senator Cory Booker join J.D. in Harlan to talk about how important it is that no community is left behind, no matter how large or small the population is. Everyone deserves the same opportunities and access to schools, grocery stores, banks, and hospitals.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069606/135205146/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
In Mondamin (pop. 379), folks huddled together during a chilly Iowa evening. J.D. and our community members came together to talk about how we can solve the biggest problems ahead, including job security, access to grocery stores, and improvements to our schools.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069607/135205147/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
Churdan (pop. 370) showed up to see J.D. and share their experiences with pre-existing conditions, failing infrastructure, and corporate consolidation in the ag industry.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069608/135205148/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
And finally, we took a break from the campaign trail for J.D. to play a light-hearted 3 on 3 basketball game with presidential candidate Andrew Yang in Ames. The athlete and competitor in J.D. never goes away, even on the campaign trail!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069609/135205149/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)
**[Help us stay on the road and meet with even more voters -- contribute $5 or more today to help J.D. get to Congress in 2020!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069610/135205150/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)**

Thanks for your help,

Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069611/135205151/-690034814?refcode=em19_191220_tourupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069612/135205157/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=&emci=ecdac35b-3523-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=aaf017b8-5d23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13069613/135205169/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=&emci=ecdac35b-3523-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=aaf017b8-5d23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ecdac35b-3523-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68/aaf017b8-5d23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYwMTdiOC01ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dz_Npi5HrsfZFHSV6N_B_zwJOYKmRwkxMjy1rmWjxY0=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: can I count on you today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I want to thank you for being part of this team. There is a lot happening in Washington and it can be easy to focus on the hearings on the hill or to get sucked in to the Democratic presidential primary.
These are both consequential things, and unseating Donald Trump is more important than ever before. But it's also important to remember that a Democratic president can only be so successful without the backing of a Democratic Senate -- and New Hampshire is critical to winning back the majority. That's why I'm emailing you today.
We're coming up on the end of the year (and our FEC deadline) and our fundraising is a bit behind.
I'd love to raise $5,000 before midnight and I'm relying on your help to get there.**[Team, can I count on you to donate $3 or more today to help us hit that goal? I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, so every deadline and every dollar makes a huge impact.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc364/2a380d31/22e69965/f0fe18/4109592829/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIxOV8xMTI2c3VwcmVjLTItcnNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191219_1126suprec-2-rs_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you again for being part of this team. I'm so glad to have you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc364/2a380d31/22e69965/f0fe18/4109592829/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIxOV8xMTI2c3VwcmVjLTItcnNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191219_1126suprec-2-rs_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Deborah Schmid
subject: A baker's dozen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Can you chip in $13 to Stephanie's campaign right now?
|
---

| | Friend -- This is my favorite time of year. Our whole family comes together to share great food, old memories, and long-standing traditions. Each person in the family has a role in preparing meals from our family cookbook (but I manage the kitchen). Since she was a little girl, Stephanie has been my sous chef. She and I start baking tiropites and spinach balls before Thanksgiving. We bake cookies and other favorite holiday treats all the way up to Christmas. On Christmas morning, we bake our egg casserole together to enjoy after opening presents around the tree. In the afternoon, I prepare the standing rib roast while Stephanie makes twice-baked potatoes. **As a mother, these traditions bring me so much joy and fill my heart.** No matter what Stephanie is doing -- fighting for the rights of others, working abroad, or running for Congress -- we keep these traditions going each and every year. I'm so proud of my daughter and everything she's accomplished -- in life and in this race. I know if she gets the opportunity to serve you in Congress, she'll make you proud too. [**Can you chip in $13 -- a baker's dozen -- to Stephanie's campaign? I know it'll mean a lot to her.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09f/522d4087/7afc1c77/4f3414fd/619538882/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191220_em_fr_bakersdozen_abx_other") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[CONTRIBUTE $13](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09f/522d4087/7afc1c77/4f3414fc/619538882/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=13&refcode=20191220_em_fr_bakersdozen_abx_13")**

name: Annie
subject: First-ever match expiring at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
I just ran the numbers again, and we're still short of our goal...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aaa/704929dc/1606a38c/3993e7a1/3414829492/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk21-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aaa/704929dc/1606a38c/3993e7a1/3414829492/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk21-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
I'm getting really worried, friend: **Our first-ever match expires at midnight tonight. But I just ran the numbers again, and we're still $4,385 short of our goal.**
There's no way Wendy's backing down from this fight. Not for a second. But she's up against a lot: POLITICO is calling our race one of the biggest House battles in the country, and our anti-choice opponent is raking in cash from lobbyists and extremist PACs. They know Wendy has what it takes to flip this red district blue, and they'll do whatever they can to stop her.
If we want to win and expand our Democratic House majority, we can't afford to waste a single dime - but right now, we're in serious danger of missing our match goal.
I don't want to sit down with Wendy tomorrow morning and tell her that we didn't take FULL advantage of this match opportunity. We may not get another one. So, friend, it's now or never:
**[Please rush $3 or more right now- and have every dollar you give DOUBLED - to flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House! ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk21-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thanks,
Annie Ellison

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aaa/704929dc/1606a38c/3993e7a3/3414829492/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aaa/704929dc/1606a38c/3993e7a2/3414829492/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aaa/704929dc/1606a38c/3993e7a5/3414829492/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: We're excited to begin this process!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
>
>
> Fellow Democrat,
>
> Every four years, Democrats from across the state have the chance to participate in the historic process of voting for the nominees for president and vice president, adopting a national party platform, and hearing from national leaders at the Democratic National Committee Convention.
>
> Every convention has been unique in its own way – This year will also be historic in its own right. We will come together and reaffirm our commitment to making health care accessible and affordable, creating an economy that works for everyone, protecting a woman’s right to choose, and defeating Donald Trump.
>
> Being a delegate is an incredible opportunity to work and organize alongside party leaders, activists, and fellow Democrats to help shape our message and build a plan for victory in the November elections.
>
> Anyone can run for delegate, and the majority of those who go to the convention are first-time delegates. We encourage everyone to participate in this process — because it’s important that West Virginia delegates are reflective of the party as a whole.
>
> If you are interested in becoming a delegate, you can start by [clicking here to download the Delegate Selection Plan Starter Kit ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13073497/135237744/119227690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2YwNDAwMS02YTIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ykITEjyY8-OMBbbftfbr8439deTQNM31_eX6WmH-8g=&emci=63c13c6b-6023-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=17f04001-6a23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=5094937)and become familiar with the proess. The filing period will begin on January 8th and forms to run for delegate will be available on that day. You can also [view our updated (as of Dec. 19th) 2020 Delegate Selection Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13073498/135237745/1817781032?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2YwNDAwMS02YTIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ykITEjyY8-OMBbbftfbr8439deTQNM31_eX6WmH-8g=&emci=63c13c6b-6023-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=17f04001-6a23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=5094937) that is still pending approval from the DNC.
>
> We’re so excited to begin this process with you.
>
> Sincerely,
> Belinda Biafore, Chairwoman

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/63c13c6b-6023-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68/17f04001-6a23-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2YwNDAwMS02YTIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ykITEjyY8-OMBbbftfbr8439deTQNM31_eX6WmH-8g=&id=106970630&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Join me to win in Texas and defeat Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I’ve spent these last two days in Fort Bend county, Texas working on the
most important election you’ve never heard of.

[1]Eliz MarkowitzEliz Markowitz is running a campaign in Fort Bend to
serve in the Texas legislature. If she wins her special election on
January 28th, she will move us one seat closer to Democratic control of
the state house for the first time since 2001. And because this seat has
always been a shoe-in for Republicans, her victory would signal a sea
change for Texas leading into the 2020 general election.

I know from experience that grassroots organizing, door-to-door block
walking, and direct voter engagement is the best way to get this done.
That’s how I’ve won long shot races in the past, it’s how I won more votes
than any Democrat in Texas history in 2018, and it’s how we’re going to
help Eliz win this race.

And it’s why I’m starting a new grassroots organization, Powered by
People, to help candidates like Eliz by bringing together volunteers from
around the state to work on the most important races in Texas.

Because it’s bigger than just one election.

If we win in Fort Bend, it will inspire the confidence, financial support
and volunteer turnout to pick up the 8 additional seats we need to control
the state house and make progress on gun violence, healthcare, education
and climate.

It will give us a shot at picking up as many as 6 additional seats in the
U.S. House of Representatives.

It will show the rest of Texas that we can finally replace John Cornyn,
Trump’s most reliable enabler, in the U.S. Senate.

And it will help energize the broad grassroots support necessary for the
Democratic Presidential nominee to win Texas’ 38 electoral college votes —
our best shot at defeating Trump and Trumpism forever.

I will spend this next year focusing on this extraordinary opportunity
through Powered by People. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42031?refcode=ema20191220-74025&t=1001&akid=74025%2E444211%2EYbQkc3 ]I would love for you to join me.

Powered by People will organize grassroots volunteers to do the tough,
necessary work that wins elections: registering Texans to vote (especially
those that have just moved to Texas and those who are just turning 18),
knocking on their doors, making phone calls, and connecting the dots so
that we all understand that in order to make progress on the issues we
care most about — like gun violence, healthcare and climate — we will have
to register, volunteer and vote.

Together, we will help Eliz win her race, help Democrats win control of
the State house, elect more Democrats to Congress and work to defeat
Donald Trump in Texas.

And if we are successful, we will not only win these important races in
2020, we will also develop the statewide infrastructure to ensure that we
have sustainable majorities into the foreseeable future.

Something happened Monday night as I was block walking in Fort Bend with
Eliz that made me feel good about what Powered by People can accomplish.
The last door we knocked on in the Cinco Ranch subdivision was Lynda’s.
She greeted us with a smile, introduced us to her three kids and then told
me that she’d volunteered for us in 2018 and is ready to get involved
again. Afterwards she found us on Instagram and sent us this note:

My neighbor and I (whose husband invited you in) block walked for Beto’s
senate campaign - the first time either of us had ever even considered
doing something like that. It was an incredibly eye opening experience for
me personally, but also to see how difficult the job can be. Thanks to
Beto for motivating me to get out of my comfort zone. I follow politics
closely and can easily feel overwhelmed by all the negativity and by what
feels like a complete rejection of things that keep our democracy strong.
Seeing you guys gave me (and my neighbor, Margie) the boost we needed!
Thank you so much and Merry Christmas to you and Beto and your families.
All the best, Lynda

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42031?refcode=ema20191220-74025&t=1002&akid=74025%2E444211%2EYbQkc3 ]I hope that you will join me and Powered by People today to that we can
connect the tens of thousands of people like Lynda across Texas who want
to make sure that we come through at this moment of truth for our state
and our country.

I’m looking forward to working with you again.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42031?refcode=ema20191220-74025&t=1003&akid=74025%2E444211%2EYbQkc3 ]Join Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=74025%2E444211%2EYbQkc3

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

And because this seat has always been a shoe-in for Republicans, her victory would signal a sea change for Texas leading into the 2020 general election. I know from experience that grassroots organizing, door-to-door block walking, and direct voter engagement is the best way to get this done. That’s how I’ve won long shot races in the past, it’s how I won more votes than any Democrat in Texas history in 2018, and it’s how we’re going to help Eliz win this race. And it’s why I’m starting a new grassroots organization, Powered by People, to help candidates like Eliz by bringing together volunteers from around the state to work on the most important races in Texas. Because it’s bigger than just one election. If we win in Fort Bend, it will inspire the confidence, financial support and volunteer turnout to pick up the 8 additional seats we need to control the state house and make progress on gun violence, healthcare, education and climate. It will give us a shot at picking up as many as 6 additional seats in the U.S. House of Representatives. It will show the rest of Texas that we can finally replace John Cornyn, Trump’s most reliable enabler, in the U.S. Senate. And it will help energize the broad grassroots support necessary for the Democratic Presidential nominee to win Texas’ 38 electoral college votes — our best shot at defeating Trump and Trumpism forever. I will spend this next year focusing on this extraordinary opportunity through Powered by People. [ ]I would love for you to join me. Powered by People will organize grassroots volunteers to do the tough, necessary work that wins elections: registering Texans to vote (especially those that have just moved to Texas and those who are just turning 18), knocking on their doors, making phone calls, and connecting the dots so that we all understand that in order to make progress on the issues we care most about — like gun violence, healthcare and climate — we will have to register, volunteer and vote. Together, we will help Eliz win her race, help Democrats win control of the State house, elect more Democrats to Congress and work to defeat Donald Trump in Texas. And if we are successful, we will not only win these important races in 2020, we will also develop the statewide infrastructure to ensure that we have sustainable majorities into the foreseeable future. Something happened Monday night as I was block walking in Fort Bend with Eliz that made me feel good about what Powered by People can accomplish. The last door we knocked on in the Cinco Ranch subdivision was Lynda’s. She greeted us with a smile, introduced us to her three kids and then told me that she’d volunteered for us in 2018 and is ready to get involved again. Afterwards she found us on Instagram and sent us this note: My neighbor and I (whose husband invited you in) block walked for Beto’s senate campaign - the first time either of us had ever even considered doing something like that. It was an incredibly eye opening experience for me personally, but also to see how difficult the job can be. Thanks to Beto for motivating me to get out of my comfort zone. I follow politics closely and can easily feel overwhelmed by all the negativity and by what feels like a complete rejection of things that keep our democracy strong. Seeing you guys gave me (and my neighbor, Margie) the boost we needed! Thank you so much and Merry Christmas to you and Beto and your families. All the best, Lynda [ ]I hope that you will join me and Powered by People today to that we can connect the tens of thousands of people like Lynda across Texas who want to make sure that we come through at this moment of truth for our state and our country. I’m looking forward to working with you again. Beto [ ]Join Powered By People

name: Sara 2020
subject: We are writing to ask you to make a $ contribution to our campaign. The truth is, Susan Collins has taken huge sums of money from fossil fuel executives and corporate PACs. We don't do that. But we have to fight back. So please chip in.
body:
Two years ago today...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9c7/3516855166/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Susan Collins has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from the fossil fuel and oil and gas industry -- including thousands from Exxon's corporate PAC.
**And two years ago today, she returned the favor by casting a critical vote on the GOP tax bill.**
The law saved Exxon billions in taxes and allowed them to QUINTUPLE their profits. Meanwhile, Maine families got left behind.
It's clear that Susan Collins stands with her rich donors and NOT with Maine families. It's time to replace her in the Senate with someone who will fight for us.
**[Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign today. Unlike Susan Collins, Sara is powering her campaign with small-dollar grassroots donations, so your gift goes especially far.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9c6/3516855166/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191220-1-full")**
Remember, we're not just up against Susan Collins in this election. We're also up against the fossil fuel industry and companies like Exxon, who will pay anything to maintain the status quo, where big donations can buy multi-billion dollar tax breaks.
This won't be an easy race, but if we keep fighting, we're going to elect Sara Gideon, a real champion for working people, to the U.S. Senate. I promise you.
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9c6/3516855166/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191220-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9c5/3516855166/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9c4/3516855166/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff5/4bef7a87/6a28d42c/287fe9db/3516855166/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Peter,

I'm reaching out because **I need your help staying on track to build up a campaign that can compete with Senator John Cornyn and WIN**. Will you give me a minute to explain why pitching in _right now_ is so important?

(If you're already with me, you can pitch in here: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/FightBackFund](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489068c/7f51f7bc/4a01a5dc/4ef0c42e/3317904165/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191220.1nd__675__&amount=10&recurring=true")**)

Senator Cornyn already aired the first TV ads of the campaign, thanks to the nearly $11 million war chest he amassed with lots of help from corporate PAC and special interest donors. He's not going to hold back. This race is already well underway, and it's clear it's going to be a long and expensive one. That's why pitching in right now is so critical.

Here's the deal: I don't have any corporate PACs pouring money into my campaign, hoping I'll play nice with them once I'm Senator. I'm not taking their money because **I will be accountable to the people, not special interests.**
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489068c/7f51f7bc/4a01a5dc/4ef0c42e/3317904165/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191220.1nd__675__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

| It's clear that these ads are working, so we need your help to keep them on the air. Will you donate today to help us stay on TV? Hey there, did you see the breaking news? Moments ago, the DNC released the new debate thresholds for January, and now more than ever, it's critical that we hit our $800,000 end-of-quarter goal to keep our ads running. **[Chip in right now to help us do it.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191220_BHQ_20191220-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is going to be a difficult threshold to meet, but here's what we know... **EARLIER THIS MONTH:** Supporters like you chipped in to help us get our first TV ad on the air. **DURING LAST NIGHT 'S DEBATE:** Americans across the country saw the ad run live during the debate featuring Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, Tom Steyer, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang. **LATER THAT NIGHT:** On CNN, a focus group of Iowa caucus-goers said that they will be caucusing for Cory on February 3rd, even though he wasn't on the debate stage. name: NewsAlert@MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: Obamacare struck down?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
A federal court just sided with the Trump administration and struck down part of the Affordable Care Act.
|
---
| | Derek,

A federal court just sided with the Trump administration and struck down part of the Affordable Care Act. Now other parts of Obamacare are under threat from the same Trump lawsuit.

name: Ed Markey
subject: Tell Trump to sign my bill and help us end robocalls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We are finally going to put a stop to the robocall madness. | |
---
| Friends -

We are finally going to put a stop to the robocall madness.

Yesterday, the Senate passed my bill -- the TRACED Act. It's aimed at ending spam robocalls once and for all.

Now it's headed to President Trump's desk, and we need to make sure he signs it quickly. Will you help me get this bill across the finish line?

**[Add your name: Tell President Trump to sign the TRACED Act into law immediately and help us stop the plague of robocalls.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfc8/693b8b0a/43996882/72de7e9b/2966393601/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/end_robocalls?source=em191220-full")**

The TRACED Act cracks down on scammers that now account for nearly half of all robocalls made in the United States.

As of November, there had been 580 million robocalls within Massachusetts alone -- that's an average of 71 calls per person.

There are a few simple things we need to solve this massive issue: call authentication, blocking, and enforcement. This bill achieves all three.

It's a clear fact that robocalls have gotten out of control. My bill will bring immense relief to Americans -- including by imposing fines of up to $10,000 per call on the spammers and scammers.

It passed the House and Senate with extremely large margins of bipartisan support. Now it's on to the president's desk, where we need to call on him to sign it quickly:

**[Add your name: Tell President Trump to act quickly and sign the TRACED Act into law. It's time to end the scourge of spam robocalls once and for all.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfc8/693b8b0a/43996882/72de7e9b/2966393601/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/end_robocalls?source=em191220-full")**

Thanks for adding your voice on this important issue.

All my best,

Ed

clean_body: We are finally going to put a stop to the robocall madness. | | | Friends - We are finally going to put a stop to the robocall madness. Yesterday, the Senate passed my bill -- the TRACED Act. It's aimed at ending spam robocalls once and for all. Now it's headed to President Trump's desk, and we need to make sure he signs it quickly. Will you help me get this bill across the finish line? "" The TRACED Act cracks down on scammers that now account for nearly half of all robocalls made in the United States. As of November, there had been 580 million robocalls within Massachusetts alone -- that's an average of 71 calls per person. There are a few simple things we need to solve this massive issue: call authentication, blocking, and enforcement. This bill achieves all three. It's a clear fact that robocalls have gotten out of control. My bill will bring immense relief to Americans -- including by imposing fines of up to $10,000 per call on the spammers and scammers. It passed the House and Senate with extremely large margins of bipartisan support. Now it's on to the president's desk, where we need to call on him to sign it quickly: "" Thanks for adding your voice on this important issue. All my best, Ed "" | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.
