name: Team Kennedy
subject: Abolish the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e51/55b66746/2d24df48/80f7083/1346294067/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | _**Tell Congress -- Abolish the Electoral College**_ [Add Your Name](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e51/55b66746/2d24df48/80f708c/1346294067/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-end-electoral-college-email") **** In their efforts to protect Donald Trump, Republicans have cycled through an endless supply of excuses, red herrings, straw men and straight-up lies. Among the most cynical is their objection to holding "a democratically elected president" accountable to the law. First: no one is above the law. **Second: Donald Trump's victory is a product of the archaic and inherently anti-democratic Electoral College.** [**Add your name -- tell Congress to abolish the Electoral College.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e51/55b66746/2d24df48/80f708c/1346294067/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-end-electoral-college-email") Under the Electoral College system, a presidential candidate could win an election with less than 25% of the popular vote. That may be unlikely. It's also compelling evidence that the Electoral College is a fatally flawed idea. Our elections rest on a good-faith assumption that our leaders will seek the support of as many people as possible. But, by making everyones' vote count differently, the Electoral College system actually incentivizes courting people not for _who they are_ , but for _where they live_. That's not democracy. That's chess. With voters as the pawns. In a democracy, every voice has value, and every vote deserves not just to be counted, but to _count:_ One person, one vote. It doesn't need to be any more complicated than that. [**Add your name to take back our democracy. Tell Congress: Abolish the Electoral College, now!**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e51/55b66746/2d24df48/80f708c/1346294067/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-end-electoral-college-email") [Add Your Name](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390e51/55b66746/2d24df48/80f708c/1346294067/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-end-electoral-college-email") _Team Kennedy_ |
---|---|---

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b792/18e32a7f/50b652ab/7b22b4c7/4124623835/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: 2019: A Year of Results
body:
Governor Holcomb is all about results. And in 2019, Governor Holcomb delivered results in a big way for all Hoosiers. Here’s just a few of his... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/2019-a-year-of-results?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_2019: A Year of Results_** **Governor Holcomb** is all about results. And in 2019, Governor Holcomb delivered results in a big way for all Hoosiers. Here’s just a few of his 2019 accomplishments:
* CNBC this year ranked Indiana’s infrastructure as the best in America. And that’s because of major investments – including $612 million in Community Crossings matching grants for local roads, and a record year for road construction as part of **Governor Holcomb’s** 20-year, fully-funded infrastructure plan.
* We passed another honestly-balanced budget and maintained our AAA credit rating – leading the way for fiscal responsibility at the Statehouse.
* **Governor Holcomb** signed into law a phase-out of income taxes on our veterans’ military pensions. This new law will work to attract and retain patriotic military veterans as part of our state’s workforce!
* **Governor Holcomb** and **Lt. Governor Crouch** this year led the state’s largest investment in broadband infrastructure in Indiana history, with $100 million going toward connecting unserved Hoosiers with access to affordable, high-speech internet.
* Indiana provided a historic increase in K-12 education funding in the state’s 2019-2020 biennial budget – with $763 million in additional funds this year...and $1.6 billion in increased funds since 2017! This includes a $150 million payoff of teacher pensions liability, which is putting more money in teacher paychecks.
* Thousands more Hoosiers are getting skilled-up to fill high-wage jobs – whether that’s through programs like Next Level Jobs or The Last Mile.
* Fewer Hoosiers are dying from the drug epidemic, and Indiana’s infant mortality rate is dropping. In fact, overdose deaths are down 12.9% across Indiana!
* Indiana’s economy keeps on growing! Our unemployment rate remains below the nation’s and below all of our neighboring states, while we’ve seen wage growth of 4%!

Look below, and check out a really fun infographic highlighting so many of these great 2019 accomplishments for Hoosiers.

But, of course, you know **Governor Holcomb**. And you know that he’s just getting started. So as together we look ahead to 2020, you can be assured that next year will be another year for results and continued Putting People First.
_
-Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:** __This week,**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** visited Plymouth to meet with county chairs and vice chairs in the 2nd congressional district. Our local party leaders are the backbone of our party’s continued growth and success. They’re the reason we won big in 2019, and they’re the reason why we’ll win big again in 2020!_
---
|
---
| **_Governor Eric Holcomb:
Putting People First in 2019_**** _ _** Governor Holcomb continued Putting People First in 2019! Check out this infographic to see how his bold Next Level Agenda is continuing to deliver results for Hoosiers:
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
| **_Indiana’s Agricultural Heritage_** **Governor Holcomb** helped the Indiana Farm Bureau celebrate its 100th anniversary at its convention, joining 1,500 Hoosiers from each of Indiana’s 92 counties in French Lick to help them celebrate Indiana’s agricultural achievements and innovations. Indiana is a leader when it comes to agriculture – not just in the United States, but around the world!

**Governor Holcomb** is dedicated to continuing to work with the Indiana Farm Bureau to accomplish their aligned goals. He’ll continue working to make sure that Indiana agricultural products get to market in the most efficient manner possible and will continue to invest in rural broadband, ensuring that our state’s farmers are able to access high-speed internet. He also announced that **Indiana State Department of Agriculture Director Bruce Kettler** will join his cabinet at the start of next year. This appointment will continue to drive Indiana’s agricultural innovation.

In Indiana, agriculture is a cornerstone of our state’s identity and story, and **Governor Holcomb** is dedicated to continuing to bring innovation to our state’s agricultural industry!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Congratulations, Rep.Holli Sullivan_** Congratulations **Rep. Holli Sullivan** on being selected Vice Chair of the Indiana Republican Party! We're glad you’re taking on this leadership role and helping the Indiana Republican Party continue to serve all Hoosiers!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Hoosiers Republicans Stand With President Trump_**
On Wednesday, instead of working to tackle real issues facing the American people, Democrats in the U.S. House of Representatives continued their partisan sham and voted to impeach **President Trump**. Here’s what some of Indiana’s top Republicans are saying about this move against the American people:

**_Congresswoman Jackie Walorski_**
“This is a sad day for our country. House Democrats have wanted to impeach President Trump since day one, regardless of the facts. They set up a rigged process with a predetermined outcome, and even though they failed to uncover a single piece of evidence to justify impeachment, today they got the result they wanted. This is pure partisan politics at its worst, and the American people deserve better.

“It’s time for Congress to put this divisive charade behind us and focus on what matters: keeping our economic momentum going, helping workers and families thrive, and protecting our national security.”

**_Congressman Jim Banks_**
“It is Speaker Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff and Rep. Jerry Nadler — not President Trump — who are guilty of abusing their power. They have put aside working on the serious issues facing our nation to pursue partisan impeachment. They should be held accountable for putting our country through this.”

**_Congressman Jim Baird_**
“Motivated by the upcoming election, Democrats in Congress have acted recklessly and ignored the fact. I stand with President Trump and look forward to passing policies that continue to move our great Country forward."

**_Congresswoman Susan Brooks_**
“...Disappointingly, the House Democrats have been solely driven by partisan animosity. Their desire to find a path to impeach the President began the day he was sworn in. Contrary to past impeachment inquiries, there was no neutral independent investigation that took place before this impeachment inquiry began. Chairman Schiff of the House Intelligence Committee led the most partisan process imaginable acting as the investigator, prosecutor, grand jury, and judge... I do not believe the President committed high crimes and misdemeanors, therefore I voted against the Articles of Impeachment.”

**_Congressman Greg Pence_**
“Democrats and their allies in the fake news media have been trying to impeach President Trump since the day he took office. The American people deserve a congress focused on them, not Democrats walking around gloating and high-fiving each other for wrongfully impeaching President Trump, trying to undo the 2016 election. The only thing Democrats have accomplished is ignoring the will of the People. I stand firmly behind President Trump, confident the American people will see through this sham impeachment. God bless President Trump, the great state of Indiana, and the United States of America.”

**_Congressman Larry Bucshon_**
“For over three years, House Democrats have been obsessed with impeaching President Trump because they simply cannot accept the results of the 2016 presidential election and are fearful for the results of the 2020 election. That is why from the outset, this sham impeachment process has been nothing more than a partisan exercise to influence the outcome of the 2020 election.

“Speaker Pelosi herself established the standard for impeachment when she said the only way she would move forward with impeachment was if the case was compelling, overwhelming, and bipartisan. Yet, the case for impeachment that has been rushed forward by House Democrats is anything but that. It woefully fails to meet this standard because it does not prove any wrongdoing or impeachable offense has actually taken place; instead, House Democrats’ case rests solely on hearsay testimony and presumptions from cherry-picked witnesses. The only thing that is bipartisan about this impeachment is the opposition to it...”

**_Congressman Trey Hollingsworth_**
“Tonight, I voted no on the Democrats' three-year long attempt to overturn the results of the 2016 election of President Donald Trump. From the start this partisan process, the only impeachment along party lines in our history, has been about political showmanship, not Americans’ priorities.”

**_Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer_**
“Now that the Democrats got their vote to impeach President Trump over with, I’m hopeful the Senate will quickly end this partisan subversion of our constitution. While Pelosi, Schiff, Schumer and the other do-nothing Democrats are rabidly attempting to overturn the 2016 election, President Trump and Republicans are negotiating fairer trade deals, strengthening our border, creating jobs, growing our economy and working on issues that actually matter to Hoosiers."
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Welcome Home, Vice President Pence!_**
Last week, it was an honor to welcome **Vice President Mike Pence** back home again to Indiana for a private campaign event with**Governor Eric Holcomb**!

| **_Get Ready for 2020:_**
**_Register for Congress of Counties_**
Get ready for 2020! It’s just six weeks until [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48ddb4467c&e=1acd9bb3d6), your Indiana Republican Party’s two-day training and networking event.

We look forward to seeing you in downtown Indianapolis on January 31-February 1 to meet Indiana’s Republican leaders and participate in breakout sessions on important campaign topics like candidate recruitment, fundraising, social media, technology, and more!

If you’re an Indiana Republican, this is an event you’ll want to attend next year! Learn more, and book your registration [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b2fad5a0c8&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Let us know at [info@indiana.go](mailto:info@indiana.go)[p](mailto:info@indiana.go)! ****

**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[joined Fox Business to discuss how Indiana is thriving](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=618a11dd4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[praises the repeal of the Medical Device Tax](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8642f327f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[questions how Dems can be impartial in impeachment trial](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c67e200883&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[says stop the impeachment charade](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5687d8abdb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[shares his thoughts on impeachment trial from D.C.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87a4633ced&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congressman Greg Pence **[congratulates Rushville FFA](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f34ec6785b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you're able, please chip in $2 or whatever you can and let's build this movement for big, structural change together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Together, we can accomplish so much -- we can put political and economic power in the hands of working people. So if you're able, please chip in whatever you can and let's build this movement for... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc12/45c30650/11111eb8f/66fa417d/1461203898/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When I got into this race, I decided to run a different kind of campaign.

I've done nearly 100,000 selfies with people in 29 states. That's 100,000 hugs, and handshakes, and stories. Stories from people struggling with student loan debt. Stories from people who can't pay their medical bills. Stories from people who can't find child care.

And best of all -- nobody has to pay a dime.

Most of the people on the debate stage last night run a traditional campaign. And that means going back and forth from coast to coast to meet rich people who can put up 5,000 bucks, or more -- maybe in a wine cave full of crystals -- in order to have a picture taken, to have a conversation, and maybe to be considered to be an ambassador.

I get it: In a democracy, we all have a lot of different points of view and everybody gets one vote.

But here's the thing: people who can put down $5,000 to have a picture taken don't have the same priorities as people who are struggling with student loan debt or struggling to pay off medical debt.

**We can't have people that can put down $5,000 for a picture drown out the voices of everyone else. They don 't in my campaign, and they won't in my White House.

[Together, we can accomplish so much -- we can put political and economic power in the hands of working people. So if you're able, please chip in $2 or whatever you can and let's build this movement for big, structural change.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc12/45c30650/11111eb8f/66fa417c/1461203898/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTg5Rl9ERUJfU0xGX0VfMjAxOTEyMjBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM89F_DEB_SLF_E_20191220_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Fighting for Progress in Challenging Times
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501142015%2501December%2bNewsletter%2b\(copy%2b2\)%250115421.14551373.4401829.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501142015%2501December%2bNewsletter%2b\(copy%2b2\)%250115421.14551373.4401829.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 20, 2019** |
---|---|---|---
| | | Over the holidays, I try to take stock of all that I'm thankful for. In addition to wonderful family and friends, I'm grateful for the opportunity to represent a state full of diverse and passionate people - where far more unites us than divides us. It's an honor to serve Maryland and be a voice for the issues Marylanders care about, from providing affordable, accessible health care to ensuring our economy works for everyone.

While we push to enact national priorities, we must also work to protect the public trust and uphold our democracy. Now that the House has completed its constitutional duty, impeachment will move to the Senate. As we go forward, it's up to you - the American people - to demand a fair trial. Republican Leader Mitch McConnell's conduct is already extremely troubling and anything but impartial. He has publicly expressed his plan to work in lockstep with the President during the trial and has rejected reasonable requests to allow key fact witnesses to testify. In short, he wants to rig the trial. I hope my other Republican colleagues will agree that we have a duty to get all the facts and do justice. If President Trump and Senate Republicans have nothing to hide, they should have nothing to fear from a fair trial. And that's why I believe the House should withhold articles of impeachment as we seek assurances from Senator McConnell that the trial will be conducted in a fair and impartial manner.

Through their hearings and sworn-witness testimonies, I believe the House has presented overwhelming evidence in support of the case for impeachment, but - unlike the Senate Republican leader - I welcome additional evidence, including any exculpatory evidence the President wants to produce. I will listen to and fairly weigh any such evidence before rendering a final verdict. That is what a trial is all about. That is our obligation under the Constitution. The American people deserve nothing less.
---
### Good News: Making Vital Investments in our Common Future
I'm pleased that, even amidst the political division, this week the Senate was able to pass legislation to fund important investments throughout our state and our country and to avoid a government shutdown. These bills include a number of key provisions for Maryland - including a historic increase in funds to protect and preserve the Chesapeake Bay. They also provide increased resources to the NIH to achieve its mission of discovering and developing life-saving cures and medical treatments for diseases that impact every American family. Additionally, this package includes critical support for Maryland's many top-notch federal agencies and military installations, such as NASA Goddard, Fort Detrick, Fort Meade, NIST, and NOAA. And it invests in important projects within our state, including oyster restoration, dredging to ensure a thriving Port of Baltimore, and WMATA.

That being said, while I support strong border security, I opposed the package that included Homeland Security funding because it failed to address one of the President's most egregious abuses of power - his actions to steal funding from Congressionally-approved projects to build his inefficient, unnecessary border wall and support his inhumane immigration policy. He has taken funding from projects at Joint Base Andrews, Fort Meade, and other military installations across our country and transferred those monies to the Department of Homeland Security. These losses will have harmful impacts on our military bases, communities, and national security.
### Making the American Dream a Reality for More Americans
We need to confront the growing wealth gap in this country and counter the Trump Tax Scam with real solutions. That's why I've introduced a Millionaires Surtax to help build a dynamic economy where everyone has a fair shot, instead of a dynastic economy based on existing wealth. Ensuring that millionaires do their part to help our country succeed by investing more in our kids' education and growing the middle class - rather than concentrating wealth among an increasingly tiny group - isn't a partisan idea. It's about making the American Dream more real for everyone. My bill calls upon those with the top 0.2% annual income (couples with over $2 million in annual income) to invest more in the success of our country and help open the doors to the American Dream for the other 99.8%. It's simple to implement and hard for tax lawyers to game the system by exploiting loopholes. Another key advantage to this approach is that it would apply to both regular income like salaries and to investment income, including stocks. That's because, unlike middle-class Americans, very wealthy households often get most of their income from investments off of their wealth rather than from their work. Polling shows that Americans across the political spectrum support it, and I'll be working to get this done.
### Tackling Challenges Abroad
One of the most troubling parts of the impeachment inquiry has been the willingness of many Republican Members of Congress to grasp onto - and spread - the false narrative that Ukraine, not Russia, interfered in our 2016 elections. This falsehood is completely inaccurate and an attempt by Putin himself to spread misinformation. We know that Russia interfered in the 2016 election from reports from our own intelligence agencies - the CIA and the FBI. Listening to some Republicans and the President trying to discredit that reality is deeply disturbing.

That's why I am very frustrated that Republican Leader Mitch McConnell has blocked my bipartisan legislation, the DETER Act, which is designed to prevent interference in our future elections. Since 2016, we have done nothing to let Putin know that future inference in our elections will be met with swift, certain, and very tough penalties on Russia and its economy. This is unacceptable. We should all be able to agree that foreign governments should not interfere in American elections. Earlier this fall, the Senate unanimously voted to include key elements of our bipartisan bill in the National Defense Authorization Act. But the Trump Administration and Mitch McConnell worked behind closed doors to remove these provisions. With the next national election less than a year away, I will continue to push my Republican colleagues to move forward on this urgent priority to protect the integrity of our elections and our democracy.

Despite this, I'm proud to say that Congress has taken a stand when it comes to North Korea's nuclear weapons and long-range missile programs, and the threat they pose to ourselves and our allies. This week, the Congress passed - as part of the National Defense Authorization Act - my bipartisan legislation to sanction North Korea, the BRINK Act. This bill will provide the needed teeth to enforce international economic sanctions against the North Korean regime. Specifically, the law will impose sanctions on banks and firms that do business with the North Korean regime and fully enforce the economic restrictions called for by the United Nations. The goal is to build the necessary pressure on North Korea to negotiate the complete and verifiable denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula. The President's repeated photo ops with Kim Jong-un have not achieved our goals. [On Wednesday, I was proud to stand alongside the parents of Otto Warmbier - who was killed by this ruthless regime - to announce the passage of our bill to hold the North Korean regime accountable.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f2596992410369765%2f%3f__xts__%255b0%255d%3d68.ARD8sVIIoRvH1cSWxOLEDqCS3Fz7N2uxvHc4xhkwTUwf98BK2_TVsqK6YmYDROWpmy5Aw0W99OD0C1dSs9p1yHzlWdp4x7tCN0Zh11oQnaKGyK6gYD2W2svO0B9fbO_ryvdu9qkLO2xBY2j1DshtY8wNw3ulrHDt6bw3wgDJNBgP8lo9u1zWt6bowuSuAbBsTGPFF1SGMX86_0KhFapcPuBdNSw9oZzIB4xNTqJztwIP4_wboTD8N0V4REApSd8AR6o32_aAmgowLLCnLvMu9oGmkYNKiZnf5ZiQ1-5fchm2a0tnSQd-NXyxvnFIxemR4M_sqJOukJqsiHJ1k0DanJEVz-TGFQ%26__tn__%3d-R&redir_log=800895532412936)
### Meeting with Marylanders
When I'm not working in the Capitol, I am out meeting folks across our state. Over the last couple of months, I've had the chance to catch up with people everywhere from Hagerstown to Prince Frederick and Baltimore to Chestertown. In October, I also had the chance to visit our troops in Afghanistan, where I met with members of the Maryland National Guard. Whenever I'm meeting with Marylanders, I'm grateful for the opportunity to learn about the important things they're accomplishing in our state and get feedback on how my team can help.

Two of the local visits I've enjoyed recently were with students at the Community College of Baltimore County, Essex Campus and Cecil College. At both colleges, I sat down with students to hear directly from them about the issues they're most interested in and concerned about. I discussed our efforts in the Senate to reduce the burden of student loans, increase access to affordable health care, and grow workforce training programs - including through the introduction of my Long-Term Unemployment Elimination Act that utilizes community colleges to get more people ready for work. These visits were a great opportunity to hear from our next generation of leaders.

I also recently held two Consumer Protection Forums with Maryland Attorney General Brian Frosh - one in Carroll County and another in Howard County - where we discussed how Marylanders can better protect themselves from scams and fraudulent schemes. Following these forums, I'm proud to announce the Congress has passed new legislation - the TRACED Act - which will increase enforcement and penalties on robocalls. As a cosponsor of this legislation, I was glad Congress could work on a bipartisan basis to get it done before the end of the year.

While next year will certainly present new challenges, I wish you a holiday season full of peace and joy!

Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15421.14551373.4401829.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)

clean_body: | | | \(copy%2b2\%250115421.14551373.4401829.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | \(copy%2b2\%250115421.14551373.4401829.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) ---|--- | | | December 20, 2019 | ---|---|---|--- | | | Over the holidays, I try to take stock of all that I'm thankful for. In addition to wonderful family and friends, I'm grateful for the opportunity to represent a state full of diverse and passionate people - where far more unites us than divides us. It's an honor to serve Maryland and be a voice for the issues Marylanders care about, from providing affordable, accessible health care to ensuring our economy works for everyone. While we push to enact national priorities, we must also work to protect the public trust and uphold our democracy. Now that the House has completed its constitutional duty, impeachment will move to the Senate. As we go forward, it's up to you - the American people - to demand a fair trial. Republican Leader Mitch McConnell's conduct is already extremely troubling and anything but impartial. He has publicly expressed his plan to work in lockstep with the President during the trial and has rejected reasonable requests to allow key fact witnesses to testify. In short, he wants to rig the trial. I hope my other Republican colleagues will agree that we have a duty to get all the facts and do justice. If President Trump and Senate Republicans have nothing to hide, they should have nothing to fear from a fair trial. And that's why I believe the House should withhold articles of impeachment as we seek assurances from Senator McConnell that the trial will be conducted in a fair and impartial manner. Through their hearings and sworn-witness testimonies, I believe the House has presented overwhelming evidence in support of the case for impeachment, but - unlike the Senate Republican leader - I welcome additional evidence, including any exculpatory evidence the President wants to produce. I will listen to and fairly weigh any such evidence before rendering a final verdict. That is what a trial is all about. That is our obligation under the Constitution. The American people deserve nothing less. Good News: Making Vital Investments in our Common Future I'm pleased that, even amidst the political division, this week the Senate was able to pass legislation to fund important investments throughout our state and our country and to avoid a government shutdown. These bills include a number of key provisions for Maryland - including a historic increase in funds to protect and preserve the Chesapeake Bay. They also provide increased resources to the NIH to achieve its mission of discovering and developing life-saving cures and medical treatments for diseases that impact every American family. Additionally, this package includes critical support for Maryland's many top-notch federal agencies and military installations, such as NASA Goddard, Fort Detrick, Fort Meade, NIST, and NOAA. And it invests in important projects within our state, including oyster restoration, dredging to ensure a thriving Port of Baltimore, and WMATA. That being said, while I support strong border security, I opposed the package that included Homeland Security funding because it failed to address one of the President's most egregious abuses of power - his actions to steal funding from Congressionally-approved projects to build his inefficient, unnecessary border wall and support his inhumane immigration policy. He has taken funding from projects at Joint Base Andrews, Fort Meade, and other military installations across our country and transferred those monies to the Department of Homeland Security. These losses will have harmful impacts on our military bases, communities, and national security. Making the American Dream a Reality for More Americans We need to confront the growing wealth gap in this country and counter the Trump Tax Scam with real solutions. That's why I've introduced a Millionaires Surtax to help build a dynamic economy where everyone has a fair shot, instead of a dynastic economy based on existing wealth. Ensuring that millionaires do their part to help our country succeed by investing more in our kids' education and growing the middle class - rather than concentrating wealth among an increasingly tiny group - isn't a partisan idea. It's about making the American Dream more real for everyone. My bill calls upon those with the top 0.2% annual income (couples with over $2 million in annual income) to invest more in the success of our country and help open the doors to the American Dream for the other 99.8%. It's simple to implement and hard for tax lawyers to game the system by exploiting loopholes. name: Hickenlooper.com
subject: First things first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks: **First,** an independent public poll of this election showed John leading our GOP opponent, Cory Gardner, in this critical Senate race. **Then,** every major political forecaster labeled this race a toss-up, with _Roll Call_ ranking Gardner as the "most vulnerable Republican Senator in 2020." **Now,** Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are furiously raising millions to spend on negative ads to tear down our campaign even before 2020 begins! **So** , we need a lot of grassroots Democrats to stand with the campaign we're building in Colorado to flip this Senate seat. With our FEC fundraising deadline in just two weeks, can we count on you to step up? [**Folks, please send an urgent contribution of $10 or more to John Hickenlooper 's Senate campaign to ensure we stay on pace to hit our FEC fundraising goal of $500,000 before the deadline >>**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy1-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy1-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") John doesn't have an army of right-wing billionaires propping him up in this election like our opponent does. Instead, we're relying on folks like you to stand with him and fund our campaign with grassroots contributions. That's the right way to win this race, and it's why your donation today matters so much to our team. Thanks in advance! -- Team Hick | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy1-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Charles Booker
subject: Did you see this, folks?
body:
|
---
Folks, I wanted to check in to make sure you saw my team’s email from the other day. While Mitch McConnell has brought in more business PAC money than any other Senate candidate, I will never accept a dime of corporate PAC money. I’m accountable to you — not the corporations that pollute Kentucky’s air and water or make the medicine folks need unaffordable. _**[Will you help this movement make up our $1,022 shortfall this week by chipping in whatever you can? A people-powered movement is the only way to finally defeat Mitch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13076963/135275340/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191220-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjc3ZGRiOC03ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ky2nzrzAjxGJVGpf7vfxghqmcOJr_q5v_S2Ht3b1do=)**_ | | [Donate $10 or more, folks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13076964/135275341/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191220-nd_b&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjc3ZGRiOC03ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ky2nzrzAjxGJVGpf7vfxghqmcOJr_q5v_S2Ht3b1do=)

Thank you for standing with this movement,
Charles Booker

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
From: Team Charles Booker
Date: Tue, Dec 17, 2019
Subject: $2,577,601 vs. $0

_**[Charles Booker counts on support from folks like you. Will you chip in whatever you can to power our movement to finally retire Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13076965/135275342/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191220-nd_a2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjc3ZGRiOC03ZDIzLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ky2nzrzAjxGJVGpf7vfxghqmcOJr_q5v_S2Ht3b1do=)**_
Folks,
Mitch McConnell has raked in **$2,577,601** in business PAC cash this campaign cycle — **_more than any other Senate candidate._**
Meanwhile, Charles Booker has accepted **$0** from corporate PACs — and that’s as high as that number will go.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We can't let Trump's attacks on immigrants slip under the radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment proceedings. He promoted Chad Wolf, architect of the family separation policy, to be the top Homeland Security undersecretary and the de facto DHS chief. And that heinous policy is still in place, no matter how well the administration's tried to bury coverage of it. And even though lower courts have ruled consistently against his illegal decision to end DACA and set up DREAMers for deportation, the president took his appeal to the Supreme Court \-- where Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We need 10,000 people to join us today, so if you agree with us, please add your name here: [**Demand Congress protect the DREAMers >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf12/6e9863e8/1749dd26/1db04a2e/2601838286/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Wy9bj8Sq") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf12/6e9863e8/1749dd26/1db04a2d/2601838286/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191220b.ND&refcode2=zJe6cwtWhpk14jtJBm09")

name: Team Kathy
subject: The stage is set
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | It's here -- filing for our race ended today and the stage is set! We have four primary opponents and two more Republican opponents. With North Carolina's newly drawn congressional maps, we have our best chance to give the Triad the leadership it deserves in Washington. **The new maps also make this one of the most competitive 2020 races out there.** [_**This is a critical moment in our campaign. If everyone on this grassroots team pitches in, we can overcome the odds. body:
---
| | The most tragic mockery of justice in the history of this nation? We think this might be an exaggeration. Chabot voted against impeaching the president, in the face of all of the evidence against Trump -- including Trump's own admission. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1") The most tragic mockery of justice in the history of this nation? **We think this _might_ be an exaggeration.** Chabot voted against impeaching the president, in the face of all of the evidence against Trump -- _including Trump 's own admission._ Representatives are obligated to put our country first and party second. **Chabot has done the opposite.** It's time to send Chabot packing -- [**chip in to help us hit our end of year (and end of quarter) goal ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+chip+in+to+help+us+hit+our+end+of+year+a&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1")

**And Chabot didn 't stop there** \-- he went on to suggest that Democrats will do anything to remove Trump from office:
[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1")
Impeachment is not a joyous thing to be celebrated, it's a somber and serious task. **House Democrats are literally risking their political careers to take a stand and protect our country.**
That's honor at its finest -- steadfastly clinging to your values, even in the face of political risk. [**If you 're ready to unseat Trump's top defenders, chip in so we can take on Steve Chabot ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=10+-+If+yoursquore+ready+to+unseat+Trumprsquo&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191220_EOQ1_U2_X1")

| |
---
| Team -

Some people will try to tell you that this race is over and decided, but in all honesty, we've just reached the starting line.

[That's why we announced our largest fundraising goal ever! This isn't some arbitrary number we made up, team. We've laid out an aggressive paid media and organizing program.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8c9/134673f2/9596d85/6997983e/3685566646/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[In order to get Michael's message in front of the 76% of undecided voters, it's absolutely crucial that we raise $700,000 to fully fund our program. Team, recent research showed that Michael has the highest cross-party support.

That's because Michael is the only candidate in this race who's won two national elections in a purple swing state - _he 's never known an easy election._

name: Democratic Response
subject: Trump administration moves to slash food stamps for MILLIONS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **NBC News:** "Trump administration proposals could cause millions to lose food stamps"
---
The Trump administration is hell-bent on dismantling our nation's safety net. **[_ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Donald Trump that Democrats won 't allow him to attack hardworking Americans!_](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY3NDg3NDkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxMTI1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---
Team - No family should have to worry about how to put food on the table, especially during the holidays - but the Trump administration just finalized a proposal that could cause millions to worry about how they'll meet their families' most basic needs.
Trump and his right-wing allies in Washington have proposed a new rule that would eliminate SNAP benefits for millions of people, mainly working families with children trying to pull themselves out of poverty.
SNAP is about addressing hunger. This rule would make it harder for families to feed themselves and prevent _**children**_ from getting meals at school.
**It 's shameful, Team, and we cannot let them get away with it. We need 100,000 people to demand the Trump administration protect SNAP benefits before 11:59 p.m., but we haven't heard from you yet:**
[**SIGN THE PETITION: Help us protect one of our nation 's most important safety nets!**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY3NDg3NDkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxMTI1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins votes with Trump over 94% of the time and still somehow considers herself a "centrist."
body:
Susan Collins is NOT a centrist.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff4/4bef7a87/6a2b40ca/287fe9d5/1163664610/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
On Wednesday, Susan Collins said she is running for reelection because there's "still a role for a centrist" in the Senate.
But here's the thing:
Senator Collins is NOT a centrist.
She voted with Trump **94% of the time** , more than she voted with any other President. And when Mitch McConnell needed her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh, she had his back.
Maybe at one point she was different -- but now, Collins is nothing more than a reliable vote for Republicans in the Senate. It's time for her to go.
**[Chip in to support our people-powered campaign today. If we fight hard enough, we will elect a Sara Gideon, a true champion for Maine families, to the U.S. Senate.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ff4/4bef7a87/6a2b40ca/287fe9d4/1163664610/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191219-2-full")**
Thanks in advance for your contribution. We're not taking any donations from corporate PACs, so the only way we take on Susan Collins and Mitch McConnell and WIN is with your support.
\- Team Sara
**We have a really important FEC deadline coming up at the end of December, so your contribution is even more important today. Chip in now >>>**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Why we need 359 people from Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| If we reach this goal, here are a few things we can do: Friend, I've emailed a few times, asking for you to chip in to help us reach our $800,000 end-of-month goal. Right now, we need 359 people from Pennsylvania to help us do it. **Here 's why this is so important. If 359 people from Pennsylvania chip in right now and we hit our goal, here are a few things we can do:**
* Fund our growing field operation -- _the Iowa caucuses are just 45 days away!_
* Reserve more ad air time to reach voters and caucus-goers in key early states.
* Help us spread our message to qualify for the January debate so that I join Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren on stage.

**So what do you say? Will you be one of the 359 people from Pennsylvania who helps us reach this goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191220_CB_20191220-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

name: Team Yang
subject: Call for Yang: Iowa Voter Outreach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Andrew is going to host a conference call this weekend for everyone who signs up to make calls. He'll shout out the top three callers of the weekend.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh) Yang Gang --

Andrew just crushed the debate stage. He delivered the message that Americans need to hear and that we need to beat Donald Trump. Now we need to do our part to spread Andrew's message to our target voters in Iowa.

To make that happen, we're launching our new national **Call For Yang** program. [Click here to join.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-iowa-calls-20191220?source=email-20191220mid-iowa-calls&t=6&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh)

Iowa will be the first major test of our campaign. We need to directly contact key voters throughout the state to identify our supporters and mobilize them on caucus night. That's why we're launching Call for Yang — and that's why we need you to start making calls.

[Please sign up to join Call for Yang and get trained on how to make calls into Iowa. We'll show you the ropes and help you along the way.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-iowa-calls-20191220?source=email-20191220mid-iowa-calls&t=7&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh)

If we want to help Andrew win the nomination, it starts in Iowa. We'll need all hands on deck to reach every target voter and put Andrew in a position to compete.

Thank you for being a part of this movement,

Team Yang

P.S. Andrew is going to host a conference call this weekend for everyone who signs up to make calls. He'll shout out the top three callers of the weekend. [So click here to sign up. Happy dialing!](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-iowa-calls-20191220?source=email-20191220mid-iowa-calls&t=8&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh) | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20128?t=2&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4950%2E377263%2EAyE7Hh) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

Peter,
**CHUCK SCHUMER HAS LAUNCHED MILLIONS IN CAMPAIGN ADS AGAINST US**
What's happening in Maine right now is different than in any other race in the country. The far Left thinks they can silence voters in Maine if they use millions of dollars from outside Maine to attack Susan Collins. And Chuck Schumer and his billionaire far-left allies are behind it.
**Susan is being attacked on all fronts and this is just the beginning.**
We have to fight back against these attacks right now and the only way we can do that is with your support. [**Can you chip in $100, $75, $50 or $25 today and help us push back on these attacks?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDEzOTAxNzYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTg5MzEzOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Noam, Stacey (2)
subject: Did you see Stacey's email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Stacey Abrams asked you to take action, Team. Did you see it?

Our team is really counting on your input on some critical issues. Hearing from you gives us insight into what's happening on the ground in FL, and your response is crucial to making sure Democrats win up and down the ballot.
Here's the best link to take the survey: **[_https://surveys.signforgood.com/DGA-abramspriorities-N_](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3NDkxOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Thanks for being a trusted source. We won't be able to beat Trump and his Republican allies without you.

Noam Lee
DGA Executive Director
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Stacey Abrams
Date: Wed, Dec 18, 2019
Subject: why I'm reaching out
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Team - I hope you're ready to make some change in this country, because together, we're in a position to write our nation's next chapter. **But we cannot do it without your help.**

A better future is not only possible - it's within reach. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold us back. They're obstructing the democratic process so that they can keep pushing Trump's hateful, divisive agenda.

I should know - when I ran for governor of Georgia in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced too many voices. That's why I'm reaching out today: **Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.** In every election up and down the ballot, we can reject the Trump-GOP agenda and flip red states blue, but we cannot do that without the input of dedicated supporters like you. **[Will you take a moment to take our official Democratic Outreach Survey to ensure Democrats can create a winning strategy, flip red states blue and stop the Trump agenda?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3NDkxOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)** **The next elections are about us. They 're our chance to fix what is broken - and to finally kick out those who broke it.** But to claim victory on Election Day, we have a lot of work to do. We have to reach out to those who do not believe their voices matter and convince them otherwise. Because here's the thing: **Inaction can be contagious, but so can a passion for change. **

With your help, we will register every last voter, get them to the polls and prove to them that elections have the power to change their lives. **But, before we do that, we need your help setting our outreach strategy.** **[Please Team, can I count on you to take a short survey to help Democrats win important elections across the country?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3NDkxOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)** Team, we can't let this fight pass us by - not after we've seen what the GOP will do to win. Change starts small, but together, I know we can lead this country toward a brighter future for everyone. Stacey Abrams

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16749194&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MTQxNDk1MQS2&spReportId=MTc4MTQxNDk1MQS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

subject: UPDATE: DNC raises thresholds (again), our new ad is out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **Breaking news this morning:** the DNC has once again raised the thresholds to qualify for the next debate. [We now need 225,000 unique donors, and we're not there yet. Chip in now to help us get there. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec539/2428462285/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+now+need+225000+unique+donors+and+wer&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all") **Last night 's debate showed just how important our campaign's leadership has been. **We've shaped the debate -- now I'm counting on you to help me do that on stage. It's going to take a big haul to qualify, but we're doing everything we can to get there. **We just launched a new ad to show how our campaign is different, and to reach new voters.[If you didn't get a chance yet, you can watch it here:](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec538/2428462285/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+If+you+didnrsquot+get+a+chance+yet+you+c&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all") ** | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec527/2428462285/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---

[Please chip in right now so we can push the ad further, expand our efforts in the Early States, and do everything we can to meet these thresholds and get back on the national stage. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec526/2428462285/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Please+chip+in+right+now+so+we+can+push+&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")

We appreciate everything you do as a part of this team.

Thank you,
Team Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec525/2428462285/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec524/2428462285/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec523/2428462285/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec522/2428462285/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec521/2428462285/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc950/3eb3e2fc/69e51085/744ec520/2428462285/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191220_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Speaker Nancy Pelosi has announced that the House will sit on its Articles of Impeachment “for as long as it takes” to get the trial they want. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aef745959b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Pelosi’s Latest Stunt is Fresh Proof How Cynical Impeachment Drive Has Been**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd96e62755&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that the House will sit on its Articles of Impeachment “for as long as it takes” to get the trial they want in the Senate. “On Thursday, she even bristled when reporters kept querying her about it. ‘Don’t you have any questions on anything else?’ she asked — when the House just spent 12 weeks to produce only the third impeachment in US history,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

**When a coup backfires:** [“Trump approval rating on impeachment day hits highest point since March 2017”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ffddd3128&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**These Have Been the Best Few Weeks of Trump’s Presidency**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da0dcfd881&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“These past few weeks have arguably been the best of Trump’s presidency — not despite impeachment, but in no small part because of it,” Marc Thiessen writes. The victories are many: USMCA is set to replace NAFTA, China has agreed to a major Phase 1 trade deal, and our booming economy is lifting worker wages and slashing income inequality.

**More:** [CNN Poll: US economy receives its best ranking in nearly 20 years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34ea439406&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**House Clears U.S.-Mexico-Canada Trade Deal in Win for Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a63a9a39c8&e=3ee4985eea)
-CBS News
“The House of Representatives passed the revised trade agreement with Canada and Mexico on Thursday, handing President Trump a major legislative victory . . . The lower chamber approved the deal, known as the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or the USMCA, with a bipartisan 385 to 41 vote,” Melissa Quinn and Grace Segers report.

**Peter Navarro:**[“President Trump is simply doing what the American people hired him to do”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=250876b2b8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Senate Sends $738B Defense Bill to Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=256d7bf489&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
The Senate passed a crucial defense bill this week that President Trump will sign today, Ellen Mitchell reports. The legislation includes everything he asked for: a big pay raise for our troops, funding for the U.S.–Mexico border wall, establishment of the Space Force as our 6th military branch, and 12 weeks of paid family leave for federal workers.

**Another signature win:** [“Trump Signs Bill Restoring Funding for Black Colleges”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf23453eb2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Obama’s FBI and the Press**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c53d607aa7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Thanks to a report from the Obama-appointed inspector general of the Justice Department, now everyone knows the truth about 2016. The Obama administration misled the U.S. Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court and wiretapped an American who supported the presidential campaign of the party out of power,” James Freeman writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca6c3eb121&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=203a4343e5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d60b64e579)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: A busy few weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Impeachment, USMCA, endorsements and more! Peter,
These past few weeks have been busy for our campaign. We’ve held Anthony Brindisi accountable on impeachment, received endorsements from some of the biggest names in the Republican Party, participated in the Fidelis Care Stuff the Bus drive, and more. | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**Anthony Brindisi Votes “Yes” on Impeachment**
This week, Anthony Brindisi and the do-nothing Democrats impeached President Trump. Our district elected Trump in 2016 by over 15%, but Anthony has supported impeachment at every step of the process. He has betrayed the hard-working people of Upstate New York.
|
---
**Brindisi Votes to Kick Millions off Medicare**
One day after voting for impeachment, Anthony Brindisi voted against opposing a government takeover of healthcare that could kick millions of American seniors off Medicare. We deserve better than the false promises of Anthony Brindisi.
|
---
**Endorsed by Kevin McCarthy, Minority Leader in the U.S. House of Representatives**
A couple of weeks ago, I was endorsed by Kevin McCarthy, Minority Leader in the U.S. House of Representatives. He has a proven track record of delivering real results for this country, and he knows I have what it takes to beat Anthony Brindisi in 2020.
|
---
**ICYMI: Other Major Endorsements**
A few weeks ago, I was endorsed by Republican Whip Steve Scalise. We have also received endorsements from major groups in the Republican Party including the **Oswego County Republican Committee** and **Winning For Women**. Republican leadership and conservative groups are paying attention to this race because we have a real shot at taking this seat back from Anthony Brindisi and liberal democrats.
|
---
**Stuff the Bus Toy Drive**
Last week, I took gifts to the Stuff the Bus Drive hosted by Fidelis Care in Utica. It’s a great cause that brings our community together and something I look forward to every year!
|
---
**Dysfunction in Albany on Bail Reform**
Bail reform signed into law by Governor Cuomo has been disastrous for our state, and showcases the dysfunction in Albany. Their plan isn’t even fully implemented yet, but each week there are new stories of dangerous criminals back on the streets committing more crimes.
|
---
**House Passes United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement**
Yesterday, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to pass the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA). Anthony Brindisi and Democrats in Congress prioritized impeaching the President over passing USMCA all year costing Upstate New York millions of dollars and putting the state of our dairy farmers at risk. I am glad to see the provisions I fought so hard for including those for our dairy farmers and small businesses included in this USMCA package and I am glad the President will finally sign the agreement.
|
---
**Cortland County Visit**
I was honored to attend the Cortland County Women’s Republican lunch where I met Marissa, one of the winners of the poster contest. Young, conservative women like Marissa are the future of the Republican Party!
|
---
To keep up with the campaign, add our email to your contacts and be sure to follow Claudia on **[Facebook](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1b40f48e923e480d807a16ff98d0c6b3&_e=DwaySpHJwIcRfHY1-s2y8uHYg3mmaSWDkQGYoYZyqKv9ENmDAscwz-A2iKRiRwwZFYtza579Z2Y40USGG8q83-X2BAAbp8NIwlC1lKlchV55zzFFOoNBGU0NM9huIWS0lpROwbeo1BNIiAuJXn3W0UEqAh_YFLb9hNpVJFhkuKuSjb8O96IgL61K9Wby0ZdqIdJHSaoeh96TVGfC5u-o1vBEgHj8KTZgwMopqGdlqTJsGSrWwGWPJhmrjNZ6Ej35GymFpct89gxuHFCYpRsZbrC7eGT4KtvNFADdwNs4CQVfBNvLk3Vfze_nPo44zdDo85LLWoQQ4XW6wiJbtjq6Q8HiqUNSU4MRg_K3ZuLWIKk4q_K0t-4FetxfDhRFk2-KsX-OC7f1MspAi7WZLucsQmZnbOwtME1MZSMcijKVoPY%3D)** and [**Twitter**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1b40f48e923e480d807a16ff98d0c6b3&_e=DwaySpHJwIcRfHY1-s2y8r-2MH7BGANQgiBIPZoaxfoQ1uQSs73TmN56xsgAqclZIHnVuwljRKLT6Wm94KfU12HLKozQZZ-VjBm3y-k3fd_WvL00eSFihRg9DdkAiiY1S9w1r4n02H8p5uXYQZzmqUfkNfv_PSOmv9cGopchufvsO8Jqt69xBVN3h-OaHtzCCvgOsKQ_-A9Q7YrQGoS4BxtQSS2HamD_6_tKIVgxn8PYeNlnFfGgN1E7Q_kTycUkykMhC7LSP9P95i68NNobu2lYMzmhSeGFbtjweLLJFvj8uvDcASM0nlxEr9l0gdmVA5wwggRUFFrPoaXx28nAEiJz4K85V_YIJ6MMF5YRvd3DXWhbOk9QC_GWwkFranegPKJJ-7RwiGfkRrm1Z1taug%3D%3D)**.**

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: Hey there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Here are three quick things you need to know about Minnesota's competitive Senate race.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191220-eoq2?refcode=em191220-eoq2&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hey there -- here are three quick things you need to know about Minnesota's competitive Senate race:

1\. Minnesota is a must-win state if Democrats want any chance of taking back the Senate next year.

2\. Trump lost Minnesota by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016, so he's making our race a top target this time around and his campaign is pledging to dump $30 million into our state.

3\. Tina is the only Senate Democrat who has to campaign back-to-back, so she's relying on grassroots supporters like you to help save Minnesota's Senate seat.

**Reaching our end-of-year goal in a few weeks is absolutely critical to building a winning campaign. Tina is fighting with everything she's got every single day, but she can't do it without you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Help President Trump Fight Back!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

**[Our president needs our help!](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=9664a1ea35&e=9f843ba602) **

This week, House Majority Democrats crossed a line that our founding fathers would have been ashamed of. They used one of the greatest powers granted to them by the U.S. Constitution to impeach a president for political gain. The charges were weak and the motivations were clear.

**[But we're fighting back!](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=6adf90a673&e=9f843ba602)**

The fact is, Democrats can’t beat President Trump and they can’t control the tens of millions of Americans who stand with him. They call us deplorable and dismiss our ideas and values as unintelligent and misguided. The fact remains – **[they can’t stop the Trump Train](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=45de86a770&e=9f843ba602)** , and with your help, we can keep this train rolling!

Your donation to this email will be split 50-50 between my campaign for Congress and President Trump's 2020 re-election campaign!

Together, we can once again show the coastal liberal elites that our voices matter, and we will no longer stay silent.

I’m running for Congress to protect our communities and to fight the radically-regressive Democrats who look to undermine our democratically-elected president and overturn the will of the American people. Please share this with your friends. Please **[sign up on my website.](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3f4bd3f4a4&e=9f843ba602)** Please **[follow me on Facebook.](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=0d6dbabcd9&e=9f843ba602)** Please **[consider a donation.](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3fa972f038&e=9f843ba602)** I ask that you please join me in this fight.

***Again, any donation using the links in this email will be divided up 50-50 with my campaign for Congress and President Trump's 2020 re-election campaign***

Thank you and God Bless.
Rob
