name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Quick update on our court case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Yesterday we went back to court, and before the hearing started we were already winning. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa598/34a064cc/1b6f16d6/703535a/2680027225/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Yesterday, our team and supporters went back to court to fight the "use it or lose it" purge of 120,000 voters. Court is adjourned, and there's no decision yet, but here's the exciting part: Even before the hearing started, we were already winning. **Approximately 26,500 Georgians -- more than 1 in 5 "use it or lose it" voters -- were already restored to the rolls due to our advocacy, organizing and legal briefing on the issues with their purge!** We will see what the court orders in the coming weeks, but we already are winning important victories for voters. Georgia is a battleground state and the epicenter of the fight for free and fair elections. But this problem doesn't just exist here. In fact, the right to vote is under attack right now across the country, and in the absence of federal protections it's up to advocacy groups like ours to fight back against these attempts to suppress the vote. [**Our work takes resources and support from people like you. So we have an important ask: Can you chip to make sure we 're ready at any moment to fight for every eligible voters' right to cast their ballot and have their vote counted?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa598/34a064cc/1b6f16d6/703535b/2680027225/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjIwMTlDRFUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE122019CDU-1-c") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa598/34a064cc/1b6f16d6/703535b/2680027225/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjIwMTlDRFUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE122019CDU-1-c")** Thank you. \- Team Fair Fight

name: Wendy Davis
subject: If we lose, it could threaten our Democratic majority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We've got to take full advantage of this match before midnight.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b3/1897114817/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b3/1897114817/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a gift - _every dollar of which will be doubled_ - to help me flip a House seat from red to blue. But first, I want to explain why if you cared about my 13-hour filibuster to protect reproductive rights, you need to care about what's happening in my little slice of Texas _right now._
**If we lose this race, it could seriously threaten our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives.** This is one of the most competitive House races in the nation - one of our best chances to pick up a seat and oust yet another anti-choice Republican.
**And that's important - because if we lose the House to Republicans, reproductive rights will be on the chopping block.** The GOP has waged a decades-long war on women's health care - and they'd love nothing more than to come after us yet again. They're already doing it in state houses across the country.
Now, I know what we're up against. This seat has been held by Republicans for four decades. My opponent has twice the cash in the bank that we have thanks to corporate PAC and lobbyist donors. The thought of flipping a seat in Texas from red to blue sounds impossibly hard.
But you know what's harder? Trying to make ends meet so you can put dinner on the table for your family or making the immensely difficult decision to end a wanted pregnancy - _that's_ hard. Those are the struggles that I've lived and that millions of Americans continue to live. **Flipping this seat blue? Our path forward is clear as day: We hit our goals. We keep up the fight. But I can't do it without you - and we're $2,110 behind our goal with this rare match expiring in just hours.**
**If you care about our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives, donate $3 or more - and have every dollar DOUBLED - to help us flip this Texas seat from red to blue. Here's the best link to have your donation matched, but only until midnight:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b2/1897114817/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk4-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b5/1897114817/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b4/1897114817/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa6/704929dc/16045d1f/3993e5b7/1897114817/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

| | I can hardly believe my eyes. My team just told me we're about to hit a HISTORIC number of Democratic Members before tonight's Early Membership Deadline! [_**I only need 1 more Democratic Member from 18326 before midnight to reach my early membership goal, WIN this critical Senate race, and DEFEAT Mitch McConnell 's Republican Senate. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191220_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191220_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

For every child whose health care Mitch McConnell harmed...

For every senior whose Medicare he threatened in order to give tax breaks to billionaires...

For every American with a pre-existing condition who has had to live in fear...

I'm asking you to take a stand with $10 before tonight's crucial deadline to help me WIN this Senate seat, DETHRONE McConnell, and ensure he can never harm another American again.

| ****[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191220_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****

Ben Ray

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b794/18e32a7f/50b8c51e/7b22b334/4005434/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b794/18e32a7f/50b8c51e/7b22b335/4005434/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.
